text:
There once was a little owl named Floppy. Floppy loved going on nocturnal adventures. Always at night.

One time, a bloodhound heard him hooting. Hootowl hates bloodhounds.

They chased him. That's always frightening.

He flew far away.

That's how owls go hawk owl.
